title: Makeup Spatula, 8 Pieces Small Silicone Spatula Colorful Jar Spatula Thin Lotion Spatula Mini Cosmetic Spatula Double-Head Cat Food Spatula Small Paint Spatulas Set for Kitchen Use Cosmetic Bottles
description:
About this item
Full Set of Scrapers: This set includes 8 pieces: 2 large scrapers (12 inches), 2 medium scrapers (9 inches), and 4 mini scrapers (5.98 inches), you can find the right tool for every task
Premium Silicone Material: These mini jar scrapers are made of premium silicone, durable, reusable, and suitable for daily use
Efficient: With a long body and narrow head, these silicone scrapers can easily get into hard-to-reach areas in jars, bottles and other small spaces, ensuring you get the most out of every drop of your product
Easy Cleaning: The integrated design of these makeup scrapers eliminates gaps, making them very easy to clean, and their compact size is easy to store and carry, perfect for travel or home use
Wide Applicable: These small silicone scrapers are perfect for cosmetics such as lotions, facial masks, lip gloss and mud masks, as well as foods such as peanut butter, ketchup, and can be used for pet cans
